name: testActivateDeactivateMerchantAcquirer
description: Verify that merchant acquirer can be activated and deactivated by Super
descriptionHtml: Verify that merchant acquirer can be activated and deactivated by Super

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that merchant acquirer can be activated and deactivated by Super

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select 'Merchant 1 for C112172' business unit using filter
Select '0713.115911 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Type '0713.115911 acquirer for gateway' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0713.115911 acquirer for gateway' in dropdown
Click on Change merchant acquirer activity button
Click on Change merchant acquirer activity button
